about.label: The Campus
about.title: BETWEEN SPAIN AND ITALY, A PROJECT THAT NEVER STANDS STILL
about.p1: Innovation Campus is an independent coworking present across two countries, two cultures and two ways of working: We offer spaces in Málaga, Olbia and Ancona and our eyes always on the people building something real.
about.p2: In Málaga we are in two places that couldn't be more different.
about.p3_text: , in the heart of the old town, within the walls of a frescoed and restored historic palace: where silence and history walk alongside you while you work.
about.p4_text: , overlooking the Mediterranean: where the blue of the sea is the backdrop to your days and the terrace is waiting whenever you need it.

items.q: Can I use both locations with one membership?
items.a: Yes! All memberships give you access to both Historic Center and Seaside spaces. Work from whichever world fits your mood.

items.q: Do you offer day passes or trial days?
items.a: Absolutely. We offer single-day passes and a free trial day so you can experience the space before committing. Just book through our contact form.
We offer flexible options: hot-desk passes (daily/weekly/monthly), dedicated desks, and private offices. Custom plans are also available for teams of 5+.
Dedicated desk and private office members enjoy 24/7 access at both locations. Hot-desk passes are available during regular business hours.
Yes — we host weekly community events including talks, workshops, networking nights, and monthly demo days. Both locations host events, often with different themes.

items.q: Can I book meeting rooms separately?
items.a: Meeting rooms can be booked by both members and non-members. Our Historic Center rooms are especially popular for client meetings.
The Seaside location has nearby public parking. The Historic Center is best accessed on foot or by public transit — it's steps from the city center.

contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.description: Ready to find your perfect workspace? Reach out and we'll help you get started.
